hook.text: 35% of girls who develop endometriosis symptoms at 11 also have this
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: Shock and concern for parents of young girls with symptoms
hook.target_audience_raw: Parents of young girls with endometriosis symptoms

main_claim.text: 35% of girls who develop endometriosis symptoms at age 11 will also have deeply infiltrating endometriosis affecting the rectum and causing bowel symptoms.

supporting_explanation.summary: The video explains that these girls have endometriosis affecting the rectum and often have bowel symptoms.

funnel_rationale: Raises awareness of a specific statistic to educate parents, positioning the condition as serious and requiring attention, then directs to a booking CTA.

cta.value_exchange_raw: Liz runs a virtual endo clinic, available privately from anywhere in the UK

topic.primary_raw: deeply infiltrating endometriosis in young girls
